name: Marinated Mushrooms
recipeInstructions:
1. Pack the mushrooms into a sterile jar.
2. Stir together the remaining ingredients in a bowl until well combined.
3. Pour the mixture over the mushrooms, ensuring they are completely covered.
4. Screw on the lid to seal the jar.
5. Chill for several hours, occasionally inverting the jar to help distribute the marinade evenly.
